products.name: WooCommerce Stock Alert System — Low Stock Email Notifications
products.description:
Get notified when your WooCommerce products run low on stock

Never miss a low-stock situation again. This plugin sends instant email alerts when products hit custom low-stock thresholds, with per-product configuration and optional daily digest.

Features:

  • Per-product low stock threshold settings
  • Multiple email recipients (staff, managers, suppliers)
  • Daily digest option — one summary email per day
  • Threshold breach log for audit trail
  • Customizable HTML email templates
  • Lightweight — single PHP file

Installation: Upload to /wp-content/plugins/, activate, configure under WooCommerce > Settings > Stock Alerts.

Compatible with WordPress 5.0 , WooCommerce 4.0 , PHP 7.4 .
products.custom_summary: Instant email alerts when WooCommerce products hit low stock thresholds
